headline: Special Olympics Airlift Takes Flight Nationwide; Dove 1 Arrives at St. Paul Downtown Airport
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., June 19, 2026--The 2026 Special Olympics Airlift took flight as Cessna, Beechcraft and Hawker aircraft, known as Doves, departed from airports nationwide.
